with love  ✦  always

Puchki

Happy Birthday, my love

scroll

My dearest Puchki,

On this day, something quietly extraordinary happened — an Angel was born. And the world, without knowing it, became little warmer.

I've tried many times to find words for what you mean to me. But some things resist language. They live in softer places — in the way time slows when you're near, in the way I notice small beautiful things more, now that I see them with you in mind.

You carry a light that doesn't announce itself. It simply settles — like golden hour, making everything look like it belongs exactly where it is.

I promise you,
I will protect you as my Daughter
I will love as my Wife
I will respect you as my Mom

On your birthday, I want you to know: you are loved. Deeply, carefully, completely.

✦   ✦   ✦

forever yours,

with all my heart ♡

✦   memories   ✦

My Angel.
us, always.
My calm in Chaos.
candid.
light.
together.
two shadows.
always.
The Drama Queen
every moment.
effortless.
My Therapist

every quiet night, it's always us.

Happy Birthday Puchki ✦   ♡   ✦
